claim_text: The future of humanity depends on thoughtful planning and management of the most advanced artificial intelligence systems.
There is a need to develop safeguards for humanity in the context of artificial intelligence development.
The rapid pace at which advanced AI systems like GPT-4 are developing is alarming and unprecedented.
Recent advances in AI present profound risks to society and humanity.
California is allowing biological boys to compete in girls' sports.
Governor Newsom has referred to the situation in girls' sports as 'deeply unfair.'
National polling shows nearly 70% of Americans agree that biological males should not be allowed to compete in girls' events.
SB 1381 expands the scope of child pornography laws to include material generated using artificial intelligence.
SB 1381 ensures that AI-generated explicit content involving minors is treated with the seriousness it deserves.
SB 1831 adds depictions of minors created with artificial intelligence to California’s existing child pornography laws.
SB 1831 aims to combat the growing threat of AI-generated explicit content involving minors.
As AI technology advances, existing laws must evolve to protect children from new forms of exploitation.
